channel.title: MacParakeet Day Journal
channel.description: Fork of MacParakeet with Day Journal feature — periodic screen capture + AI-driven daily second-brain

item.title: MacParakeet Day Journal v0.6.0-journal.5
item.description: Public repo + GitHub Pages update channel. Dedicated analyzeJournal LLM method. Clickable journal entries with calendar navigation. Meeting transcript integration. Loading indicators.
